empty: No videos found in the configured directory

auto_pause.description: Pause playback while a fullscreen window covers the wallpaper (mpvpaper --auto-pause)
auto_pause.label: Pause When Covered

extract_last_frame.description: Automatically extract a frame from the video to use as the static wallpaper when playback is stopped
extract_last_frame.label: Static Fallback Frame

mpv_options.description: Additional space-separated mpv options, e.g. panscan=1.0 video-zoom=0.1
mpv_options.label: Extra mpv Options

run_as_systemd.description: Run the wallpaper in a systemd transient scope to enforce strict resource limits
run_as_systemd.label: Run as systemd Service

video_directory.description: Folder scanned for wallpaper videos; defaults to ~/Videos when empty
video_directory.label: Video Directory

title: Video Wallpaper
